name: 前院
description: 崔庄前院，护院和下人住处，如今部分已改为杂物房和客房。院内有厨房，是日常起居之所。

visual.prompt: Chinese rural courtyard front yard, Republican era, simple houses, oil painting style

name: 农田
description: 崔庄外的农田与荒地，附近有坟场和荒山，亭子后面有一处隐蔽的山洞。

visual.prompt: Chinese rural farmland and wasteland near a lake, autumn, oil painting style

name: 画舫
description: 三层高的画舫「宵烛舫」，停泊在巢湖大码头旁。一层有宴会厅和厨房，二层有小宴厅和客房（甲乙丙房），三层有观景屋。船头装有手摇发电机。

visual.prompt: Three-story Chinese painted pleasure boat on a lake, oil painting style, autumn evening

name: 北院
description: 崔庄北院，女眷居所。有家主房、昔颜房、西屋等。家主房北侧小窗可眺望湖光，地基高约40厘米。

visual.prompt: Chinese traditional inner courtyard for women, Republican era mansion, oil painting style

name: 秘密线索
description: 需要特定条件才能解锁的隐藏线索。

visual.prompt: Mysterious hidden clues, aged paper documents, oil painting style
